title: Fugu Plus
description: A new and exciting Modpack (made primarily for the use of a small group of friends on the Fugu Private Server)
body:
A new Vanilla+ style datapack (although it's a bit more like Vanilla++).
This pack was made with the sole purpose of being used on the Private Fugu SMP, as such, it may not be as optimized as possible, but I'd like to think we did a good job.

Complete With:

- Whole hosts of new creatures, hostile and friendly!
- Loads of new structures to explore!
- A whole new Villager system! (Minecraft Comes Alive)
- A whole new technology tree! (Create-based)
- Plenty new decorations and blocks to encounter!
- New Transportation systems! (Plains, Trains, and Ships)
- Brand new Bosses! (As well as updated boss fights for existing ones)
- Just a small bit of new dimensions! (Enter the Bumblezone)
- Complete overhaul of the old dimensions! (Better Nether & Better End)
- Tougher hostile mobs!
- Optimizations galore!
- Better WorldGen!
- Breathtaking visuals! (Distant Horizons + Shaderpacks)
- Even more secrets to uncover!

This pack is designed to remain faithful to Vanilla minecraft while also creating a more fun, immersive, and wholy unique new experience.

For Full Mod List: [https://pastebin.com/8bSdx8Ye](https://pastebin.com/8bSdx8Ye)

Non-Modrinth Mods:

- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brewin-and-chewin-fabric
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clumps
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling-for-fabric
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-more-automation
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-ultimate-factory-forge-fabric
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cultural-creators-fabric-create-and-cultural
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cultural-delights-fabric
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite-fabric
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/regrowth
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/searchlight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/searchlight)
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/portable-mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/portable-mobs)

None of these mods were created by the Fugu Team. All credit to original mod authors (names in mod list)
